Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Looks like Chidori still ain't back yet.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I get it's her own fault for runnin' off on her own, but she's still one of us, ya know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}If she hasn't yet freed herself, that must mean her Evoker was taken.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Our first objective must be to retrieve it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}It would mean nothing to free Chidori without it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}For us, our Persona is as precious as our very lives.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}We should wait for an opportunity.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}They've found their own navigator... Their own set of eyes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Without Chidori, we'd only be playing into their hands.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Sorry, I lost my cool there for a second.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}They took down that Shadow during the last full moon like it was nothin'.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}If they got someone who can predict our moves, it'll be hard to catch 'em off guard...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}By the way, what is that thing? It looks like some kinda clunky Evoker...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}This is one of the first Evokers ever developed. I suppose you could call it a prototype.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}...Oh, that's right. You've never seen this before, have you, Jin?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}This was truly a terrible piece of work.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}In exchange for drawing out the full extent of a Persona's latent power, the cost is that they become exceedingly difficult to control.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Especially for those who had their power... forced upon them, like ourselves.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}To a Persona that has lost control, the user is but a shackle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}In those days, it was more commonplace to be killed by our own Personas than by the Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}This was the result of one such killing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}"I am a shadow, the true self..." Regardless, I'm not one to dwell on the past.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}So, that's why you don't use an Evoker...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Hardly. The real reason is far more practical.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}I don't use one because I have no need. I don't require something as inelegant as a tool to prove my resolve.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 212 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}You really are somethin' special, Takaya.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Yet, there is always someone out there who is even greater. Such as... one who can wield multiple Personas...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Am I feeling... attachment for someone...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 211 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}Such a thought is beneath me.[n]{f 1 1}
